body_txt: WHAT DO WE WANT? Well, it's complicated. The bane of not only The Man but also everyone else in earshot of their protests, the Asinine Activist Group is emblematic of all the dysfunction, pettiness, and infighting that undermine civil rights movements. At best, they may come off as Stupid Good people whose hearts are in the right place, even if their minds aren't. At worst, they're so odious that they seem like a blatant Take That! against groups that the creator doesn't like , with the intention being that said groups are Damned by a Fool's Praise . They are commonly depicted as:  The most common parodies are those of left-wing movements, usually by making them ineffectual parodies of Civil Rights Movement who ape the aesthetics and slogans of the 1960s, but for a far less inspired or impactful cause. Right-wing parodies tend to be Moral Guardians inspired by the Red Scare or Satanic Panic who shout " Think of the Children! " and rally against mass media corrupting the youth. Sister trope to Animal Wrongs Group and Zombie Advocate . See also Straw Feminist , Activist-Fundamentalist Antics , "Angry Black Man" Stereotype , and Fox News Liberal for similar characters designed to mock a certain point of view. For the Asinine Activist Group's (ostensibly) more radical comrades, see Revolutionaries Who Don't Do Anything and Malcolm Xerox . For their "natural habitat", pay a visit to Strawman U . Definitely No Real Life Examples, Please!
